title: View Transitions
description: Fix the broken view transition CSS that should create smooth cross-fade animations between page states
html:
Card One

This card transitions smoothly between states.

Card Two (Expanded)

This is the expanded state of a card with a view transition name.

validationRules.message: Expanded card should have light blue background

hints.text: View Transition pseudo-elements require a transition-name parameter: ::view-transition-old(*) or ::view-transition-old(specific-name).
Add (*) to ::view-transition-old and ::view-transition-new. Change 3s to 0.3s. Add ::view-transition-group rules for named transitions.
Fix pseudo-element syntax with (*) parameter and reduce duration to 0.3s.
